summary: The patient’s symptoms strongly indicate possible scurvy due to dietary habits but require confirmation through laboratory tests for accurate differentiation; notable findings should focus on assessing Vitamin C levels along with clotting factor profiles indicative of hemophilia. \boxed{s}
